When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it's decorated with cream.
When Alcremie is content, the cream it secretes from its hands becomes sweeter and richer.
Desserts that Alcremie have decorated with their cream have a rich, sweet flavor and bring happiness to all who eat them.
Alcremie that have been cherished produce exquisite cream, so Trainers always raise them lovingly.
